record.title: Staggered DID summary for upgrade_panel.csv
record.content:
Staggered DID estimated with cohort-specific event-time indicators.
Event window: [-4, 4] omitting -1.
record.content_excerpt: Staggered DID estimated with cohort-specific event-time indicators. Event window: [-4, 4] omitting -1.

narrative: Staggered DID estimated with cohort-specific event-time indicators.

manual_checklist: Download the prepared sample asset referenced in sample_asset_id.
Rebuild any derived regressors listed in derived_columns before estimation.
Use the listed regressors, covariance_type, and sample filters to reproduce the model manually.
Compare the reproduced coefficient table with the coefficients array term by term.
filters: Rows without dependent variable are excluded.

figures.title: Staggered DID dynamic effects
figures.summary: Dynamic treatment effects by event time with 95% confidence bands.

asset.title: upgrade_panel-staggered_did_dynamic.png
asset.description: Dynamic treatment effects by event time with 95% confidence bands.

metadata.summary: Dynamic treatment effects by event time with 95% confidence bands.

interpretation.headline: Staggered DID estimates are exposed in full so you can read the result and reproduce it manually.

sections.title: What is shown on this page
items: Coefficient table is shown with standard errors, test statistics, p-values, and significance stars.
Supporting tables included: dynamic_effect_table, cohort_time_table, event_window_audit.
Figures included: Staggered DID dynamic effects.

sections.title: How to read the main result
items: Use the metrics panel for headline diagnostics, then move to the coefficient table or supporting tables for the formal result.
The specification block records the exact equation or parameterization that should be reproduced manually.

sections.title: Manual replication focus
items: Download the referenced sample and rebuild all listed derived columns before estimation.
Match the equation, regressors, covariance type, and sample filters exactly.
Compare the resulting table or figure object term by term with the result shown here.
